name: python3-trio
title: python3-trio
summary: Python async concurrency and I/O library
description:
Python async concurrency and I/O library
Trio is a Python async concurrency and I/O library like Twisted or the asyncio
standard library, but with an API rethink following lessons learned from
asyncio and Dave Beazley's Curio. The author claims that the resulting design
is radically simpler than older competitors like asyncio and Twisted, yet just
as capable.
.
This project is young and still somewhat experimental. The API has not yet
been declared stable. If you need more mature or with a more stable API,
then Python's asyncio library, or the older Twisted, are probably better bets.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-trio because Python async concurrency and I/O library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-trio as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-trio with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-trio --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
